message:
test(fnp-python): expand random conformance to 29 MUST distributions

Add conformance tests for 19 additional RandomState distributions:
beta, chisquare, f, geometric, laplace, logistic, lognormal,
negative_binomial, pareto, power, rayleigh, standard_cauchy,
standard_exponential, standard_gamma, standard_t, triangular,
vonmises, wald, weibull, zipf.

Coverage: MUST 29/29 (100%), SHOULD 18/18 (100%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
